entries.title: [RESOLVED via V1.42.1 hotfix] V1.42 merge exposed 2 works_api test regressions — runtime_lock acquire wired into append_inspiration BEFORE work existence check, leaking lock across tests
entries.source: gh-actions run 27394800917 (Rust tests); PR #54 CI; tests: handler_append_inspiration_returns_404_for_unknown (returns 500 instead of 404) + patch_work_stage_change_is_auditable (lock leaked from previous test)
entries.scope: crates/nexus-daemon-runtime/src/api/handlers/works.rs (append_inspiration at line 1150: RuntimeLockGuard::acquire precedes work existence check; introduced by e8993870 P0 T2); suspected cascade in patch_work mutating paths
entries.target: V1.42.1 hotfix — move RuntimeLockGuard::acquire AFTER the work existence check; ensure Drop-release on 404/500 paths; add test isolation helper to clear orphan locks between tests; PM-override path-1 was a mistake: pre-existing claim was based on stale c249c902 base, contradicted by main HEAD c0f6cd62

resolution.fixes: 5 sites in 2 handlers; 2 new regression tests; 9/9 CI checks pass

entries.closure_note: evaluate_after_persist_volume_aware wired into supervisor (process_auto_chain_after_terminal) + boot (boot auto-chain handler); cross-volume supervisor integration test passes (4/4 supervisor_cross_volume). F-001 resolved by fix commit 1a873632 (F-001 fix-wave).
entries.closure_evidence: commit 1a873632 fix(F-001): wire evaluate_after_persist_volume_aware into supervisor + boot auto-chain; supervisor_cross_volume 4/4 pass; F-001 closed by qc1 targeted re-review (commit b2a58edc)

entries.title: is_work_completed uses flat current_chapter comparison — correct under current invariants but architecturally fragile
entries.closure_note: V1.44 P2 multi-volume hardening shipped. Predicate hardened to volume-aware COUNT query; supervisor `next_volume` threaded through enqueue_auto_chain_step / WorkFields / preset input. Verified by hermetic tests in supervisor_cross_volume.rs (8 tests) and nexus-local-db (190 tests).

entries.title: reconcile_from_filesystem hardcodes volume=1 — multi-volume chapter files silently skipped
entries.closure_note: V1.43 P-last T3: reconcile_from_filesystem now parses volume from frontmatter (defaults to 1). Also fixed frontmatter status on insert — was always 'not_started'; now applies actual frontmatter status via update_status call. Test test_reconcile_volume_aware_from_frontmatter. Commit 445e0f1d.
entries.closure_evidence: crates/nexus-local-db/src/work_chapters.rs — volume-aware reconcile + frontmatter status fix + test

entries.title: Supervisor NextChapter match arm ignores next_volume — volume context lost before schedule enqueue
entries.closure_note: V1.44 P2 multi-volume hardening shipped. Predicate hardened to volume-aware COUNT query; supervisor `next_volume` threaded through enqueue_auto_chain_step / WorkFields / preset input. Verified by hermetic tests in supervisor_cross_volume.rs (8 tests) and nexus-local-db (190 tests).
Migration DDL DROP TABLE IF EXISTS work_chapters_legacy guard added at top; migration is now idempotent (re-run on already-migrated DB succeeds; data preserved). W-01 resolved by fix commit 28d842ab.
entries.closure_evidence: commit 28d842ab fix(W-01): add idempotency guard to V1.42 multi-volume migration; v142_migration_fixes test passes (w01_v142_migration_idempotent); W-01 closed by qc3 targeted re-review (commit f662b0db)

entries.closure_note: Composite index idx_work_chapters_next_volume_aware (work_id, status, volume, chapter) added in migration DDL; next_chapter_volume_aware query uses the index (EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN shows no SORT, no full table scan). W-02 resolved by fix commit c9a8ff35.
entries.closure_evidence: commit c9a8ff35 fix(W-02): add volume-aware next-chapter index + migration tests; v142_migration_fixes test passes (w02_volume_aware_index_coverage); W-02 closed by qc3 targeted re-review (commit f662b0db)
